# SEO Analyzer

> Free SEO analyzer for websites and Etsy listings. Get a score, see what's wrong, and follow a plain-English step-by-step fix guide.

SEO Analyzer is a free browser tool with two analyzers: a website SEO checker that fetches and grades any URL (title, description, headings, alt text, links, Open Graph, keyword density) and an Etsy listing optimizer that scores a title, description, and tags and returns AI-generated rewrites.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Run the website or Etsy SEO analyzer.
